_comment: Per-Pokemon deal-hunting buckets. Same shape as legacy pokemon_queries.json, but per character with accent color. Add more characters freely.

characters.name: Pikachu
characters.tagline: The mascot. The icon. The card that built the hobby.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: The legends. Illustrator. Trophy. 1st Edition Shadowless. Look but don't touch — these are the cards that built the hobby.

buckets.label: 1st Edition Base Set
buckets.blurb: The card that started it all — 1999 Wizards of the Coast Base Set.

buckets.label: Vintage Holo
buckets.blurb: Wizards-era classics + the 2016 Evolutions remake.

buckets.label: Surfing & Flying Pikachu
buckets.blurb: 1999 promo. Surfing 28/64 Jungle is a Hall of Fame card. Flying is rarer.

buckets.label: Pikachu V / VMAX / VSTAR
buckets.blurb: Big-energy Sword & Shield era. Rainbow Rare VMAX is the trophy chase.

buckets.label: Pikachu ex / Special Illustration Rare
buckets.blurb: Scarlet & Violet 'ex' era. SIR = Special Illustration Rare = the prettiest art.

buckets.label: Promo & Black Star Promos
buckets.blurb: Convention exclusives, McDonald's drops, birthday cards, etc. Lots of variety, mostly affordable.

buckets.label: Pikachu PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint. Holds value better than raw long-term.

characters.name: Charizard
characters.tagline: The chase card. The flame. Every collector's white whale.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: 1st Edition Shadowless Base Set. Trophy cards. Sealed booster boxes. The cards that broke records.

buckets.label: Vintage Holo Charizard
buckets.blurb: 1999-2000 Wizards-era Charizards. Even unlimited Base Set is a piece of history.

buckets.label: Charizard V / VMAX / VSTAR
buckets.blurb: Sword & Shield Charizards. Shiny VMAX and Rainbow Rare are tournament-grade chase.

buckets.label: Charizard ex / Special Illustration Rare
buckets.blurb: Scarlet & Violet ex era. 151 set SIR Charizard is the modern grail.

buckets.label: Shining / Shiny Charizard
buckets.blurb: Neo Destiny Shining and EX Dragon Frontiers Gold Star — the alt-color royalty.

buckets.label: Charizard PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint. The grade that turns a $50 card into a $500 card.

characters.name: Mew
characters.tagline: The original mythical. Pink, psychic, and very, very rare.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: Ancient Mew sealed promos, Trophy Mews, EX Holon Phantoms Gold Star — the mythical's mythical cards.

buckets.label: Ancient Mew Promo
buckets.blurb: 1999 movie promo — looks like nothing else. Sealed in original packaging is the play.

buckets.label: Vintage Mew
buckets.blurb: Wizards-era and early e-Card Mews. Often overlooked, often undervalued.

buckets.label: Mew V / VMAX
buckets.blurb: Fusion Strike Mew VMAX alt art is one of the best modern arts ever printed.

buckets.label: Mew ex / SIR
buckets.blurb: 151 set Mew ex SIR is a stunner — soft pink artwork on a foil canvas.

buckets.label: Mew PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint Mews. PSA 10 Ancient Mew sealed is the holy chase.

characters.name: Mewtwo
characters.tagline: The clone. The villain. The most powerful psychic card art in the game.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: 1st Edition Shadowless Mewtwo. Shining Mewtwo. Gold Star Mewtwo. Powerful, rare, expensive.

buckets.label: Vintage Holo Mewtwo
buckets.blurb: 1999 Base Set Mewtwo holo and the Dark Mewtwo Team Rocket variant.

buckets.label: Shining Mewtwo
buckets.blurb: Neo Destiny Shining Mewtwo — the alt-color blueprint.

buckets.label: Mewtwo V / VMAX / VSTAR
buckets.blurb: Pokemon GO set Mewtwo VSTAR rainbow + V Alt Art are the modern chases.

buckets.label: Mewtwo ex / SIR
buckets.blurb: 151 set Mewtwo ex SIR — Tokyo skyline artwork that prints money.

buckets.label: Mewtwo PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint. PSA 10 Base Set Mewtwo holo is a vintage cornerstone.

characters.name: Eevee
characters.tagline: Eight evolutions. Infinite cards. The cutest investment vehicle on the planet.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: Gold Star Eevees and Eeveelution VMAX Alt Art rainbows — the chase set of the modern era.

buckets.label: Vintage Eevee
buckets.blurb: Jungle and e-Card era Eevees — affordable entry into vintage.

buckets.label: Eeveelution V / VMAX Alt Arts
buckets.blurb: Evolving Skies Eeveelution VMAX Alt Arts — the most beloved modern set ever printed.

buckets.label: Eevee ex / SIR
buckets.blurb: Scarlet & Violet era Eevee + Eeveelution ex SIRs. Umbreon SIR is a wallet-killer.

buckets.label: Eevee Heroes / Japanese
buckets.blurb: Eevee Heroes (Japanese) is the source set for all the Eeveelution VMAX Alt Arts.

buckets.label: Eevee PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint Eevees and Eeveelutions. Umbreon PSA 10 is a household name.
